output: I’m checking how this repo represents story tasks and the `retry` flow so I can run the right command for `26-2-snapshot-resume-config-hash-validation:quality` without guessing.I found the story record and the `retry` task is part of the workflow engine, not the old standalone `codeharness retry` state command.
